revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-100

Phase coding (in Loran C)

The shifting in a fixed sequence of the relative phase of the carrier cycles between certain pulses of a group this facilitates automatic synchronisation in identical sequence within the group of eight pulses that are transmitted at each repetition interval.

It also minimises the effect of unusually long skywave transmissions causing one pulse to interfere with the succeeding pulse in the group received by groundwave.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Loran C Phase coding}}
